description_long: This is a single-story bungalow set on a rectangular plot with a well-maintained lawn, surrounded by trees, shrubs, and flower beds. The main building features a long, low profile with a gable roof and a prominent front porch area. There is a detached garage or outbuilding to one side, connected by a driveway that curves from the street. The property includes a fenced backyard with a patio area, visible garden landscaping, and a small pool or water feature. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern along the front and sides, with some grouped together. The exterior is finished in a combination of brick and siding, with a shingled roof and paved walkways.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gable roof, front porch, detached garage, landscaped yard, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, front porch, driveway, and landscaped garden with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the detached garage, backyard, patio, and garden features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the length of the bungalow, fenced backyard, and additional landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the pool or water feature, patio, and side garden.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
